title: Introduction to Automated Testing and Unit Tests

questions.sentence: To build reliable web applications manual testing is not enough
This is where automated testing comes in
A unit test focuses on verifying the individual blocks of code usually a single function or component to ensure they work correctly in isolation
Popular tools for this in the front end ecosystem include Jest and Vitest
While writing tests takes extra time initially it saves a lot of effort in the long run by catching bugs as soon as they are introduced
Automated tests also give developers more confidence in their code when making changes or refactoring
